summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 40 hydrated open pull requests. Validation identified 28 targets as security-sensitive, so those are routed to central OpenClaw security handling with non-mutating route_security actions. The remaining 12 PRs are kept as independent open items because this shard is not a dedupe cluster and no close, merge, or fix gates are enabled.
